info.description: One input in a form (name, email, message, etc.).

name.description: Internal field name sent to HubSpot, e.g. firstname, email.

type.description: Input type: text, email, textarea (multi-line), or select (dropdown).

label.description: Label shown above the field, e.g. First name.

placeholder.description: Grey hint text shown inside the empty field (optional).

required.description: Tick if the visitor must fill this in.

options.description: For 'select' dropdowns only: the choices, one per row.
